island_description: Discover Burginsel on-site in augmented reality mode through your camera.
single_description: Learn more about the individual buildings of Burginsel, also conveniently from home.
welcome_text: The visualization of the vanished Horneburg castle complex was created in collaboration with the municipality of Horneburg, the district of Stade and the HafenCity University Hamburg. Discover the different buildings that once stood here and immerse yourself in life from 450 years ago.
discovery_prompt: How would you like to discover Burginsel? On-site or from home?
all_models_description: Explore the 3D model of all models interactively from all angles.
